Functions for handling ANCS notifications and notification removal in Pebble firmware.

# Purpose
This header file declares two functions related to handling notifications in an ANCS (Apple Notification Center Service) context. The function [`ancs_notifications_handle_message`](<#ancs_notifications_handle_message>) processes a notification message using a unique identifier (`uid`), properties of type `ANCSProperty`, and pointers to arrays of `ANCSAttribute` for notification and application attributes. The function [`ancs_notifications_handle_notification_removed`](<#ancs_notifications_handle_notification_removed>) manages the removal of a notification, identified by `ancs_uid`, and also uses `ANCSProperty` to specify properties of the notification. The file includes necessary dependencies for ANCS types and timeline items, indicating its integration with a larger system for managing notifications.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdlib.h`
- `comm/ble/kernel_le_client/ancs/ancs_types.h`
- `services/normal/timeline/item.h`


# Function Declarations (Public API)

---
### ancs\_notifications\_handle\_message<!-- {{#callable_declaration:ancs_notifications_handle_message}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_notifications.h#L25>)

Handles an ANCS notification message.
- **Description**: Use this function to process a notification message received from the Apple Notification Center Service (ANCS). It requires valid notification and application attributes to function correctly. The function checks for necessary attributes, such as the app ID, and processes the notification based on its properties. It handles specific cases like incoming calls, missed calls, and SMS notifications. Ensure that the attributes provided are not null and contain valid data before calling this function.
- **Inputs**:
    - `uid`: A unique identifier for the notification. Must be a valid 32-bit unsigned integer.
    - `properties`: A bitmask of properties associated with the notification. Must be a valid `ANCSProperty` value.
    - `notif_attributes`: A pointer to an array of `ANCSAttribute` pointers representing notification attributes. Must not be null and must contain valid attribute data.
    - `app_attributes`: A pointer to an array of `ANCSAttribute` pointers representing application attributes. Must not be null and must contain valid attribute data.
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`ancs_notifications_handle_message`](<ancs_notifications.c.md#ancs_notifications_handle_message>)  (Implementation)


---
### ancs\_notifications\_handle\_notification\_removed<!-- {{#callable_declaration:ancs_notifications_handle_notification_removed}} -->
[View Source →](<../../../../../../../../src/fw/services/normal/notifications/ancs/ancs_notifications.h#L30>)

Handles the removal of a notification identified by a unique ID.
- **Description**: Use this function to manage the removal of a notification from the notification center when the notification is identified by a unique ID. It must be called only if the device supports iOS 9 or later, as indicated by the presence of the DIS service. If the notification corresponds to an incoming call, additional handling is performed. The function does not perform any action if the device does not support iOS 9.
- **Inputs**:
    - `ancs_uid`: A unique identifier for the notification. It must be a valid 32-bit unsigned integer that identifies the notification to be removed.
    - `properties`: A bitmask of type `ANCSProperty` that specifies properties of the notification. It must include `ANCSProperty_iOS9` to indicate iOS 9 support. If `ANCSProperty_IncomingCall` is set, the function will handle the removal of an incoming call notification.
- **Output**: None
- **See Also**: [`ancs_notifications_handle_notification_removed`](<ancs_notifications.c.md#ancs_notifications_handle_notification_removed>)  (Implementation)
